---
title: "Prepare fruit votes"
format: html
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(knitr)

```

### Prepare data

```{r}
#| include: false

ds <- read_xlsx("data/topfruitspublic.xlsx")

```

```{r}
#| include: false


ds_long <- ds |>
  
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(first, second, third),
    names_to  = "rank",
    values_to = "fruit"
  ) |>
  
  mutate(rank = case_when(
    rank == "first" ~ 1,
    rank == "second" ~ 2,
    rank == "third" ~ 3,
  )) |> 
  
  select(fruit,name,rank, everything()) |> 
  drop_na(fruit, rank, name) 

```

```{r}
#| include: false

write_csv(ds_long, "data/fruits_long.csv")

```


```{r}
#| echo: false

ds_long |>
  count(diet_type, fruit, sort = TRUE) |> 
  kable()

```
